sentences.translation: Djevojčica je čula: «Mladost je vjetar a starost je umor».
sentences.translationEn: The little girl heard: «Youth is wind and old age is fatigue».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ عَلَيْنَا اسْتِثْمَارَ طَاقَةِ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da trebamo iskoristiti energiju mladosti.
sentences.translationEn: This means that we should invest the energy of youth.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَتَعَلَّمَ الْعَزْفَ عَلَى الْبِيَانُو وَهِيَ صَغِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je naučiti svirati klavir dok je mala.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to learn to play the piano while she is young.

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَتْ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَأَصْبَحَتْ عَازِفَةً مُمَيَّزَةً.
sentences.translation: Vježbala je svaki dan i postala je odlična sviračica.
sentences.translationEn: She practiced every day and became an outstanding pianist.
